title: Finn's Missing Wood
description: adds colors of wood missing in the base game
body:
This mod aims to add a color of wood for all vanilla dyes.



update 1.0.0

1. adds salt from smelting a water bucket.
2. adds bleach crafted from 8 salt and bottled water.
3. adds bleached planks/woodset crafted from any wooden plant surrounding bleach item.
4. adds grim woodset crafted from 8 bleached planks around a black dye.




I will be working of the other colors and will update this mod until I add a wood type for all colors of wood not in vanilla.

1.3
added
Void & Aqua woodsets made with bleached planks and there pigment

added pigment for all new wood types other then bleached, bleach was already used to make it 

1.4
burgundy woodset and pigments

1.5 
added tangerine woodset
